title: Channel Partner Program
intro: Zar Ventures invites local professionals and firms across Chhattisgarh to partner with us as Channel Partners and represent our real estate projects within their respective regions on a purely commission-based model.

sections.title: Project Collaboration
items: Zar Ventures will share approved and active projects under collaboration
Projects will include residential, commercial, and plotted developments
Detailed project information, pricing, and inventory will be provided
Marketing collateral and sales guidelines will be shared for promotion
Partners will represent Zar Ventures projects within their assigned territory

sections.title: Customer Sourcing & Local Representation
items: Channel Partners will generate customer leads from their local area
Act as the first point of contact for potential buyers
Conduct initial discussions and site visit coordination
Support customers through inquiry, booking, and follow-up stages
Maintain ethical selling and transparent communication

sections.title: Commission-Based Engagement
items: Partnership will operate on a purely commission-based structure
Commission will be linked to successful bookings and collections
Clear commission slabs defined per project
Timely and transparent commission disbursement
No fixed fees, retainers, or employment obligations

sections.title: Roles, Responsibilities & Compliance
items: Follow Zar Ventures' sales processes and branding guidelines
Adhere to RERA regulations and local compliance requirements
Share accurate customer and transaction information
Maintain professionalism and brand reputation
Avoid misrepresentation or unauthorized commitments

sections.title: Support & Growth Enablement
items: Regular project updates and inventory status sharing
Sales training and product knowledge sessions
Dedicated coordination support from Zar Ventures team
Performance tracking and feedback mechanism
Opportunity to scale across multiple projects and regions

cta.title: Ready to Become a Channel Partner?
cta.description: Join us and grow your real estate business. Contact us to learn more about our Channel Partner Program.
